Net $5,660.60 / Gross $5,805.10 / 231 guests / 135 orders / $24.50 per guest, $41.93 per order / Labor 21.6% of net (~$1,222.69) / Discounts 2.5% (~$145.13) / 11 void items / $0 refunds / 110 card payments / 0 open orders. Auto-clocked out: Tony Rincon, Christine Vargas. Up strongly vs Wed Jul 8 (Net $4,599.80). Group email carries no SDLW/4-week comparison.

disapprovals.detail: Previously Disapproved (Destination not working HTTP 404 iOS + Copyrighted content, Jun 9). As of the Sat Jun 27 live scrape this campaign is fully 'Eligible' (no longer Limited) and served Jun 26 (913 impr, 38 clicks, $26.72). Appears fully recovered; confirm destination URL fix held.
